label: 10th (SSC)
title: 10th (SSC)
subtitle: Stream: Foundation | Duration: Completed at age ~15-16
description: The 10th Standard (SSC) is the foundation of your academic journey. After passing 10th, students can choose Science, Commerce, or Arts streams for 11th-12th, or opt for diploma/vocational courses directly.

sections.about: The 10th Standard (SSC) is the foundation of your academic journey. After passing 10th, students can choose Science, Commerce, or Arts streams for 11th-12th, or opt for diploma/vocational courses directly.
topColleges: Any local school or junior college
sections.careerScope: Stepping stone to all streams. Choose wisely based on your interests.
sections.keySkills: Basic Mathematics, Science, English, Social Studies

label: 12th Commerce
title: 12th Commerce
subtitle: Stream: Commerce Stream | Duration: 2 years (11th + 12th)
description: Commerce stream after 10th opens up career options in business, finance, management, law, and more.

sections.about: The Commerce stream opens doors to Finance, Accounting, Business Management, Law, Entrepreneurship, and many professional fields. Students study Accounts, Economics, Business Studies along with English.
sections.careerScope: Accounting, Finance, Law, Business Management, Entrepreneurship, and related fields.

label: 12th Science (PCM)
title: 12th Science
subtitle: Stream: Science Stream | Duration: 2 years (11th + 12th)
description: Science stream with Physics, Chemistry, Maths leads to engineering, architecture, defense, and research careers.

sections.about: The Science stream opens doors to Engineering, Medicine, Research, IT, and many professional fields. Students study Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics/Biology along with English.
sections.careerScope: Widest career options – Engineering, Medicine, IT, Research, Defense, and more.

label: 12th Science (PCB)
title: 12th Science
subtitle: Stream: Science Stream | Duration: 2 years (11th + 12th)
description: Science stream with Physics, Chemistry, Biology leads to medical, paramedical, and life sciences careers.

sections.about: The Science stream opens doors to Medicine, Research, Paramedical, Agriculture, and other life science fields. Students study Physics, Chemistry, Biology along with English.
sections.careerScope: Medical, Paramedical, Research, Agriculture, Veterinary, and allied health sciences.

label: 12th Arts
title: 12th Arts
subtitle: Stream: Arts/Humanities Stream | Duration: 2 years (11th + 12th)
description: Arts stream opens up careers in humanities, social sciences, law, design, journalism, and more.

sections.about: The Arts stream opens doors to Law, Journalism, Social Sciences, Public Administration, Design, and creative fields. Students study History, Geography, Political Science, Economics along with English.
sections.careerScope: Law, Journalism, Public Service, Social Work, Psychology, Design, and creative industries.

label: Engineering
title: Engineering
subtitle: Stream: Professional Degree | Duration: 4 years (B.Tech/B.E.)
description: Engineering is a popular career after 12th Science (PCM).

sections.about: Engineering offers excellent career prospects in various industries including IT, Aerospace, Construction, Manufacturing, and Renewable Energy. It combines theoretical knowledge with practical applications.
sections.avgSalary: ₹5-10 LPA (starting), up to ₹20+ LPA with experience
sections.careerScope: Software, Hardware, Aerospace, Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, Chemical, and emerging tech sectors.

label: Medical (MBBS)
title: Medical (MBBS)
subtitle: Stream: Professional Medical Degree | Duration: 5.5 years (MBBS + 1 yr internship)
description: MBBS is the primary degree for becoming a doctor. Other options are listed below.

sections.about: Medicine offers the noble profession of healthcare delivery. MBBS graduates can specialize in various fields like Surgery, Medicine, Pediatrics, Psychiatry, and more.
sections.careerScope: Doctor, Surgeon, Specialist, Medical Researcher, Public Health Professional, and more.

label: Law (LLB)
title: Law (LLB)
subtitle: Stream: Professional Law Degree | Duration: 5 years (5yr integrated) or 3 years (after graduation)
description: Law can be pursued after 12th (5-year integrated) or after graduation (3-year LLB).

sections.about: Law is a prestigious profession offering careers in litigation, corporate law, government service, academia, and more. It combines ethical values with professional expertise.
sections.careerScope: Lawyer, Judge, Corporate Counsel, Legal Advisor, Government Service, Academics.
sections.keySkills: Communication ◆ Analytical Skills ◆ Critical Thinking ◆ Integrity

label: Management (BBA/MBA)
title: Management (BBA/MBA)
subtitle: Stream: Business Management | Duration: 3 years (BBA), 2 years (MBA)
description: Management degrees lead to careers in business, HR, marketing, and entrepreneurship.

sections.about: Management education develops leaders and entrepreneurs. BBA provides foundation while MBA offers specialization in Finance, Marketing, HR, Operations, and more.
sections.careerScope: Business Manager, Consultant, Entrepreneur, HR Head, Finance Manager, Marketing Director.

label: Design & Fine Arts
title: Design & Fine Arts
subtitle: Stream: Creative Arts | Duration: 3-4 years (Bachelor)
description: Careers in design and fine arts are open after 12th Arts or Commerce.

sections.about: Design and Fine Arts offer creative expression and professional career opportunities in fashion, graphic design, animation, interior design, and digital media.
sections.careerScope: Fashion Designer, Graphic Designer, Animator, Art Director, Interior Designer, Digital Designer.
sections.keySkills: Creativity ◆ Visual Communication ◆ Software Skills ◆ Innovation

label: Hotel Management
title: Hotel Management
subtitle: Stream: Hospitality Management | Duration: 3 years (Bachelor), 2 years (Diploma)
description: Hotel Management degrees lead to careers in hospitality, tourism, and events.

sections.about: Hotel Management combines business acumen with hospitality skills. Graduates work in hotels, resorts, airlines, cruise lines, event management, and travel companies.
topColleges: Welcomgroup Graduate School of Hotel Administration
sections.careerScope: Hotel Manager, Chef, Event Manager, Travel Consultant, Cruise Staff, Restaurant Manager.
